news.title:
Ola Electric Mobility approves change in IPO proceeds utilization.
The company also extends the timeframe for fund utilization.
news.summary:
Ola Electric Mobility approves change in IPO proceeds utilization.
The company also extends the timeframe for fund utilization.

news.title:
Electric mobility stocks, led by JBM Auto, surged up to 14% on March 18, driven by strong volumes.
JBM Auto, Olectra Greentech, Ather Energy, and Ola Electric saw notable gains, with JBM Auto reversing March losses.
news.summary:
Electric mobility stocks, led by JBM Auto, surged up to 14% on March 18, driven by strong volumes.
JBM Auto, Olectra Greentech, Ather Energy, and Ola Electric saw notable gains, with JBM Auto reversing March losses.

news.title: Ola Electric is reportedly facing a cash crunch, raising concerns.
news.summary: Ola Electric is reportedly facing a cash crunch, raising concerns.

news.title:
Ola Electric faces cash crunch due to falling scooter sales, weak balance sheet, and battery strategy shifts.
Plans include ₹2,000 crore stake sale in Ola Cell, key to its capital-intensive battery business growth.
news.summary:
Ola Electric faces cash crunch due to falling scooter sales, weak balance sheet, and battery strategy shifts.
Plans include ₹2,000 crore stake sale in Ola Cell, key to its capital-intensive battery business growth.

news.title:
Citi cuts Ola Electric's TP to ₹22 from ₹27, citing 5–14% FY26–28 revenue cuts.
Concerns include market share loss, slow EV adoption, weak cash flow, & 3.5x FY27E EV/Sales valuation.
news.summary:
Citi cuts Ola Electric's TP to ₹22 from ₹27, citing 5–14% FY26–28 revenue cuts.
Concerns include market share loss, slow EV adoption, weak cash flow, & 3.5x FY27E EV/Sales valuation.

news.title: Ola Electric identified as one of the top 5 movers on Tuesday.
news.summary: Ola Electric identified as one of the top 5 movers on Tuesday.

news.title: Ola Electric plans to raise ₹2,000 crore for its battery division, Ola Cell Technologies.
news.summary: Ola Electric plans to raise ₹2,000 crore for its battery division, Ola Cell Technologies.

news.title:
Ola Electric Q3 revenue at ₹470 Cr, gross margin 34.3%, deliveries 32,680.
Capex completion shifts focus to scaling, profitability; service gaps acknowledged.
news.summary:
Ola Electric Q3 revenue at ₹470 Cr, gross margin 34.3%, deliveries 32,680.
Capex completion shifts focus to scaling, profitability; service gaps acknowledged.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs downgraded Ola Electric Mobility to 'Neutral', cutting its price target by 50% to ₹26.
Ola Electric's market cap fell to ₹11,269 crore; stock down 66% from IPO price and 32% YTD.
news.summary:
Goldman Sachs downgraded Ola Electric Mobility to 'Neutral', cutting its price target by 50% to ₹26.
Ola Electric's market cap fell to ₹11,269 crore; stock down 66% from IPO price and 32% YTD.

news.title: Ola Electric plans to cut its store count to 550 by March end.
news.summary: Ola Electric plans to cut its store count to 550 by March end.

news.title:
Ola Electric shares rose nearly 4% after Bombay HC stayed CEO Bhavish Aggarwal's arrest warrant.
This development ended a 4-day decline in Ola Electric's stock performance.
news.summary:
Ola Electric shares rose nearly 4% after Bombay HC stayed CEO Bhavish Aggarwal's arrest warrant.
This development ended a 4-day decline in Ola Electric's stock performance.

news.title:
Ola Electric's Co-CEO cites service issues impacting sales but foresees regional recovery.
He projects ₹15,000-20,000 Cr revenue potential with improved service and full capacity.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's Co-CEO cites service issues impacting sales but foresees regional recovery.
He projects ₹15,000-20,000 Cr revenue potential with improved service and full capacity.

news.title:
Bombay High Court in Goa halts warrant against Ola Electric's CEO.
The warrant was issued earlier by the Consumer Commission.
news.summary:
Bombay High Court in Goa halts warrant against Ola Electric's CEO.
The warrant was issued earlier by the Consumer Commission.

news.title:
Ola Electric's volumes declined due to service execution gaps impacting customer confidence.
Bhavish Aggarwal noted delays in service accessibility and turnaround times affected brand trust.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's volumes declined due to service execution gaps impacting customer confidence.
Bhavish Aggarwal noted delays in service accessibility and turnaround times affected brand trust.

news.title: Citi downgrades Ola to 'Sell', reducing the target price from 55 to 27.
news.summary: Citi downgrades Ola to 'Sell', reducing the target price from 55 to 27.

news.title:
Ola Electric shares fell nearly 3%, hitting a 52-week low.
The decline follows ongoing brokerage downgrades.
news.summary:
Ola Electric shares fell nearly 3%, hitting a 52-week low.

news.title: Emkay downgrades Ola Electric from Buy to Sell, cuts target price to 20.
news.summary: Emkay downgrades Ola Electric from Buy to Sell, cuts target price to 20.

news.title: Ola Electric reports record low quarterly revenue following store closures and layoffs.
news.summary: Ola Electric reports record low quarterly revenue following store closures and layoffs.

news.title:
Ola Electric's Q3 loss narrows to ₹487 Cr from ₹564 Cr YoY.
Revenue declines 55% to ₹470 Cr; EBITDA loss improves to ₹270 Cr YoY.
news.summary:
Ola Electric's Q3 loss narrows to ₹487 Cr from ₹564 Cr YoY.
Revenue declines 55% to ₹470 Cr; EBITDA loss improves to ₹270 Cr YoY.
